creator: no-reply@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Pawel Pekala from comment #3)
> Does not build for me, please see build log:
> 
> http://people.freebsd.org/~pawel/buildlogs/vimb-2.8.log

The problem may be due to outdated libsoup. Please try building with the following patches applied to your Ports tree. I would be glad if someone commented on them.

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=193625
